code: export class TokensStoreParser{constructor(){this._diamonds=0;this._items=[];}flush(){this._diamonds=0;this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._diamonds=wrapper.readInt();const count=wrapper.readInt();this._items=new Array(count);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();const key=wrapper.readString();const title=wrapper.readString();const durationHours=wrapper.readInt();const price=wrapper.readInt();const imageKey=wrapper.readString();const owned=wrapper.readBoolean();const activeUntilTs=wrapper.readInt();this._items[i]={id,key,title,durationHours,price,imageKey,owned,activeUntilTs};}return true;}get diamonds(){return this._diamonds;}get items(){return this._items;}}
